milestone: AGH-8 Layer 5 Bounded LLM User-Surface Orchestrator
scope: Action Router + State Reader + LLM provider(Fixture/OpenAI/Anthropic) + JSON schema contract + forbidden-copy guardrails + deterministic fallback template.
decision: q_layer5_llm=B (bounded LLM wrapper) — real LLM API calls are allowed with a strict JSON schema, forbidden-copy enforcement, cited-id whitelist, and deterministic fallback.
llm_contract: LLMResponseContractV1 enforces answer_ko/en length caps, cited_packet_ids ≥ 1, fact_vs_interpretation_map keys ⊆ cited_packet_ids, recheck_rule, blocking_reasons.
guardrail_layers: 3. Cited packet id subset of allowed state-bundle packet ids
5. Deterministic template fallback on any failure, marked llm_fallback=True with categorical fallback_reason
redaction_policy: UserQueryActionPacketV1 payload passes through redact_mapping() so forbidden tokens never leak back into the packet body (count-only reasons are preserved).

coverage: action router classifies three kinds (why_changed, system_status, research_pending) + default fallback
state reader scopes packets by asset_id
orchestrator happy path uses FixtureProvider, guardrail passes, UserQueryActionPacketV1 persisted
forbidden token in answer triggers fallback with fallback_reason forbidden_copy:count=N
run_layer5_ask defaults to fixture provider when no env vars set (no network)
contract rejects fact_vs_interpretation_map with unknown key
